The '''Froffli''' [[Species/Legends|species]] were a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] member race easily recognized by their prominent hair-spurs. While many [[Human/Legends|Humans]] found their appearance ridiculous, others (such as [[Talon Karrde]]'s associate [[Chin]]) arranged their own hair in a similar fashion.

Froffli culture was quite vindictive. During the [[Caamas Document]] crisis, they were among the first to demand that the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothans]] pay the [[Caamasi/Legends|Caamasi]] reparations. This was partly because they wanted justice for the Caamasi, and partly because Bothan trade policy since about [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] had taken a heavy toll on Froffli industry.
